content: agent1: implementing Optional Image Border Cropping Support - adding crop_margin param to Image feature in src/datasets/features/image.py. Will touch only that file.

Ack. I've already added crop_margin field (after decode, before id) and inserted crop logic right after image.load() in decode_example, before the 'if self.mode' block. Please insert your CMYK->RGB conversion between image.load() and my crop block, so order is: load() -> CMYK convert -> crop -> mode convert. I'm done with my changes now, diffing to patch.txt. Let me know when you're done so I can double check no clobber.
